ground_truth_soft: A recommendation is relevant (soft) if it shares at least one of the query destination's labels. WARNING: with 8 broad labels, this makes Precision@K appear very high (~0.98). See strict_precision_at_K for a fairer metric.
ground_truth_strict: A recommendation is strictly relevant if Jaccard(labels_A, labels_B) >= 0.33. This requires non-trivial label overlap and is a more honest signal for a course evaluation.
